# The Data Duel
> Independent, data-driven reviews and comparisons of email marketing tools. No sponsorships. Affiliate links disclosed.

## About
The Data Duel publishes honest head-to-head comparisons, in-depth reviews, and roundups of email marketing software including Kit (ConvertKit), Moosend, GetResponse, Mailchimp, and alternatives. All pricing data is independently verified.

## Articles
- [Best Email Marketing Tools 2026 — Honest Roundup](https://thedataduel.com/articles/best-email-marketing-tools-2026): Last updated: June 2026 | Northstar Lead Automation
- [Kit (ConvertKit) Review 2026 — Honest Verdict for Creators](https://thedataduel.com/articles/kit-review): Last updated: June 2026 | Northstar Lead Automation
- [Kit vs. Mailchimp 2026 — Head-to-Head Comparison](https://thedataduel.com/articles/kit-vs-mailchimp): Last updated: June 2026 | Northstar Lead Automation
- [Kit vs. Moosend 2026 — Head-to-Head Comparison](https://thedataduel.com/articles/kit-vs-moosend): Last updated: June 2026 | Northstar Lead Automation
- [Moosend Review 2026 — Honest Verdict for Budget-Conscious Businesses](https://thedataduel.com/articles/moosend-review): Last updated: June 2026 | Northstar Lead Automation

- [Best Kit (ConvertKit) Alternatives for 2026](https://thedataduel.com/articles/best-kit-alternatives-2026): Kit (formerly ConvertKit) is excellent for creators — but it's not for everyone. Maybe the pricing doesn't fit your budget. Maybe you need features Kit doesn't have. Maybe you've outgrown it.
- [Best Email Marketing for Small Businesses in 2026: What Actually Works](https://thedataduel.com/articles/email-marketing-for-small-business-2026): Before comparing platforms, it's worth being explicit about what small businesses should evaluate:
- [GetResponse vs Mailchimp: Which Is Better in 2026?](https://thedataduel.com/articles/getresponse-vs-mailchimp-2026): You've narrowed it down to two options: GetResponse or Mailchimp. Both are well-known, both have millions of users, and both promise results. So which one actually wins for your business in 2026?
- [How to Migrate from Mailchimp to Kit in 2026 (Without Losing Your List)](https://thedataduel.com/articles/how-to-migrate-mailchimp-to-kit): Rushing the export is the most common migration mistake. Take 30–60 minutes to document your current setup before touching anything.
- [Kit (ConvertKit) Pricing 2026: Full Breakdown for Creators and Newsletter Writers](https://thedataduel.com/articles/kit-pricing-breakdown-2026): Kit offers three plans: Free, Creator, and Creator Pro. Each tier is designed around a specific stage of the creator journey.
- [Kit vs. GetResponse: Which Is Better in 2026?](https://thedataduel.com/articles/kit-vs-getresponse-2026): Two strong platforms. One decision. Let's make it easy.
- [Mailchimp Pricing 2026: The Hidden Costs They Don't Advertise](https://thedataduel.com/articles/mailchimp-pricing-hidden-costs-2026): Mailchimp offers four tiers: Free, Essentials, Standard, and Premium. Here's what each plan costs at the contact levels that matter most to small and mid-size businesses.
- [Mailchimp vs Moosend Email Deliverability 2026: Which Actually Reaches the Inbox?](https://thedataduel.com/articles/mailchimp-vs-moosend-deliverability): First, a clear definition. Deliverability is not the same as "delivered." Your email marketing platform will show you a "delivered" rate that excludes hard bounces — but an email that lands in the spam folder is technic…
- [Moosend Pricing 2026: Full Breakdown — Every Tier, Every Feature, Every Dollar](https://thedataduel.com/articles/moosend-pricing-breakdown-2026): Almost everyone uses Moosend Pro. It's a single paid tier with pricing that scales based on your subscriber count — no artificial feature gating between "Standard" and "Premium" tiers like competitors use.
- [Moosend vs. Kit: The Best Budget Email Tool?](https://thedataduel.com/articles/moosend-vs-kit-budget): You've got a growing list, a tight budget, and two solid options in front of you: Moosend and Kit. Both promise to help you build and monetize your audience. But which one actually delivers more value for the money?
- [Top 3 GetResponse Alternatives for Creators](https://thedataduel.com/articles/top-3-getresponse-alternatives-creators): GetResponse is a powerful platform — but it wasn't built with creators as the primary audience. If you're a blogger, course creator, newsletter writer, or content entrepreneur, you may find that GetResponse feels a bit …
- [Webflow vs WordPress: Which Should You Choose in 2026?](https://thedataduel.com/articles/webflow-vs-wordpress-2026): You're building a website. You've heard about both Webflow and WordPress. You've probably read enough conflicting takes to feel more confused than when you started.
